name: Ham Quiche (Microwave)
recipeIngredient: 1 tbsp Finely chopped green onion (with top)
2 tbsp Finely chopped, fully cooked smoked ham
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix 1/3 - cup all-purpose flour, 1 tablespoon plus 1 teaspoon cornmeal, and 1/4 teaspoon salt in a bowl.
2. Add shortening to the dry ingredients and mix thoroughly until well incorporated.
3. Sprinkle in 5 - 6 teaspoons water, tossing with a fork until all flour is moistened and the dough forms a ball.
4. Divide the dough into two halves and press each half firmly onto the bottom and side of two 10-ounce quiche dishes or custard cups.
5. Prick the bottom and sides thoroughly with a fork.
6. Place the dishes on inverted saucers in the microwave oven.
7. Microwave uncovered on high (550 watts) for 2 minutes; rotate dishes 1/2 turn.
8. Continue microwaving until the pastry appears dry and flaky, about 1 1/2 to 3 minutes.
9. Sprinkle shredded mozzarella cheese and finely chopped green onion evenly over the shells.
10. In a separate measuring cup, beat together eggs, milk, salt, and red pepper sauce with a fork, then stir in the cooked ham.
11. Microwave uncovered on medium heat (385 watts) until warm, stirring after 1 minute, for about 2 to 3 minutes.
12. Carefully remove the shells from the microwave and place them back onto the inverted saucers.
13. Continue microwaving uncovered on high (385 watts) for another 2 minutes; turn dishes 1/2 turn.
14. Finish microwaving until the center of the quiche is almost set, about 2 to 3 minutes.
15. Serve and enjoy.
